prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity. No coordinates, contacts, AlphaFold-style models, or post-seal validation annotations are allowed.

RCSB title: SK3D-Matured in complex with GluN1-GluN2B, full refinement. Entity description: SK3D Light chain. Organism: Mus musculus. Polymer composition: heteromeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived low-complexity tendency high; sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies. Coordinates, native contacts, residue-residue distances, and validation annotations are unopened before the prediction hash.
